## Summary
- What problem does this PR solve?
- Why is the change needed?

## Root cause or scope
- Root cause for bug fixes, or acceptance criteria for features.

## Changes
- Main implementation details.
- Important files or modules touched.

## Validation
- [ ] `pnpm --filter backend lint`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter backend test`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter backend build`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter frontend lint`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter frontend build`
- [ ] Manual QA steps documented below when needed

## Manual QA
1. Step-by-step verification for UI or integration behavior.
2. Include screenshots or recordings when the change is visual.

## Risks / follow-up
- Known limitations, rollout notes, or items intentionally left out.

## Issue
Closes #
